news.t: Launch of New U.S. Treasury Covered Call Index Expands Bloomberg Indices' Multi-Asset Offerings
Amplify ETFs Announces the Amplify Bloomberg AI Value Chain ETF (NYSE: AIVC)

holdings.infoBox: AIVC is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are MediaTek stock at 4.08%, Micron Technology at 3.81%, Marvell Technology at 3.71%, SK hynix at 3.47%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 3.34%.

overview.description: The Amplify Bloomberg AI Equal Weight ETF (AIVC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg AI Value Chain NR index. The fund is passively managed and invests in an equal-weighted global portfolio of companies engaged in cloud computing, AI hardware, and semiconductors. AIVC was launched on Mar 8, 2016 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
